CreateIpSet.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See ClientToken Idempotency for details.
CreateIpSet.name: Name of the IP address family. Allowed characters: letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_/. special chars; must start with a letter or Chinese character; length 1–65.
CreateIpSet.ipVersion: IP version, value: IPv4 or IPv6.
CreateIpSet.ipSetIds: Associated IP address group IDs; ipVersion must match the IP address family being created; up to 5 IDs per request.
CreateIpSet.description: Description of the IP address family; max length 255 characters.
